questions.q: What was the main concern of the United States during the Cold War?
questions.explanation: The Cold War centered on the spread of communism.

questions.q: What movement did Martin Luther King Jr. lead?
questions.explanation: He led the Civil Rights Movement against racial discrimination.

questions.q: What do the 13 stripes on the flag represent?
questions.explanation: The stripes stand for the original thirteen colonies.

questions.q: What do the 50 stars on the flag represent?

questions.explanation: Independence Day marks the adoption of the Declaration of Independence.
